Connect with your
ideal customers

AppLovin creates meaningful connections by empowering your business to bring ideas, products, and content to your ideal customers.

Get started now
When the right content finds the right person,
users are more engaged and success comes naturally.

Access massive scale.
Grow your business.

AppLovin connects you to audiences in-app, on mobile devices, across streaming TV, and beyond to over 1.4B daily active users, so your business can do more, accelerate faster, and achieve meaningful growth.

Powerful, flexible solutions for every business need

Leverage our advanced set of solutions for your business and access multi-channel success.

Scale your growth with our AI-based advertising engine.

Scale your growth with our AI-based advertising engine.

Maximize your mobile app’s monetization potential.

Maximize your mobile app’s monetization potential.

Drive marketing results with top-performing creatives.

Drive marketing results with top-performing creatives.

Gain access to AppLovin's programmatic exchange

Gain access to AppLovin's programmatic exchange

Create more value across your customers’ lifecycles.

Optimize performance with powerful, unified analytics.

Find and monetize your customers on streaming TV.

Ready to accelerate the growth of your business?

Create an account

Innovative technology
that’s always learning and improving

Our AI models train against billions of data points to continually improve - placing our technology at the forefront of the industry so you achieve your goals and increase your revenue.

Optimize your entire ad stack to acquire more users, drive better monetization, and measure with certainty.

Leverage real-time automated tools to capitalize on every new opportunity.

The impact of AppLovin across industries

AppLovin changes the way people do business — from gaming to media, finance, and more. We’re continuously expanding industries at massive global scale.

Explore success stories

GAMING

Legend of Slime leveraged AppLovin’s Growth Suite to rocket up the Top Charts

MEDIA

Picsart scaled their user base with cost-efficient ROI by advertising on streaming TV with AppDiscovery

FINANCE

AppDiscovery empowered top-rated finance app, Brigit, to significantly increase subscriptions while driving down CPE

SHOPPING

Leading food delivery app, Yemeksepeti, finds profitable scale in a crowded market with AppDiscovery

FITNESS & HEALTH

With AppDiscovery, Daily Yoga was able to continually double its MoM installs while improving D0 ROAS by 62%

UTILITY

TownWiFi achieved an 8X increase in ARPDAU using MAX’s advanced features

Accelerate your entire business

Find and connect with your customers at scale.
